title: Bhānder Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Bhānder with a Z-Score of +4.69. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Bhānder is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 15.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 27%, and the wind speed is approximately 15.3 km/h. 
 These conditions are resulting in a significant increase in energy consumption and health risks for the local population.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Bhānder
